<!-- Thanks for contributing. Keep PRs small and focused — one concern per PR. -->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Linked issue / discussion

<!-- Closes #N, or refs Discussion #N. If neither: explain why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (no behavior change for the happy path)
- [ ] Feature (new user-visible capability)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change at all)
- [ ] Docs / typo
- [ ] Test / tooling

## Testing done

<!-- What did you actually test? Repos? Sessions? OSes? -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For visual changes. Drag a file in. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused on one concern
- [ ] Conventional commit style on the squash-merge title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] PLAN.md updated if this changes scope or design
- [ ] README updated if this changes user-facing behavior
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
